name: important-modules
description: A modern Node.js API template built with TypeScript, Express, MongoDB, Winston logging, and Sentry error monitoring using functional programming patterns.

scripts.build: npm run generate && tsc && npm run sentry:sourcemaps
scripts.prod: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=prod npm start
scripts.dev: npm run generate && nodemon --watch src -e ts --exec ts-node src/server.ts
scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: sentry-cli sourcemaps inject --org nnaemeka-bethrand --project worldshop-server ./dist && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org nnaemeka-bethrand --project worldshop-server ./dist
